refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what sorting algorithms are and why they are important for organizing data.
I should figure out what makes a sorting algorithm efficient and how it can help with searching customer records.
I need to think about how much memory the algorithm will use and how it can work with lots of updates at the same time.
I should find out what the customer records look like, like how many records there are and what fields are in each record.
I might want to define how I will measure the efficiency of the sorting algorithm, like speed and memory usage.
I could look into some common sorting algorithms and see which ones might be good for this problem, like quicksort or mergesort.
